title: Trichinopoly Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Trichinopoly with a Z-Score of +3.14. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Trichinopoly is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 81%, and the wind speed is moderate at 13.0 km/h. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high.
